member.name: T:Etch.Gpu.Compositor.GpuCompositor
member.summary: End-to-end GPU compositor for Etch scenes using the strip-coverage pipeline. Orchestrates: classify → strip emit → upload → render → readback.

member.name: M:Etch.Gpu.Compositor.GpuCompositor.RecordRenderPass(Etch.Gpu.RenderPass,Etch.Scene.SceneBuffer,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Records the strip-coverage geometry pass into an existing . Caches GPU buffers by scene reference so static scenes skip classify/emit/upload.
